## Checklist
- [ ] I have run the code locally  
- [ ] I reviewed my own diff  
- [ ] Complex or non-obvious logic is commented  
- [ ] Documentation updated (if applicable)  
- [ ] No new warnings introduced

- [ ] This change does not intentionally break `main`
